meaning: n.东方,东,东部地区adj.东方的,从向东来的adv.在东方,向东方,朝东方
examples: A cold wind blew from the east.
They live on the east coast.
A gale was blowing from the east.
Cruise east through the Esplanade, a green masterpiece designed by Frederick Law Olmsted.
From 1961 to 1989 it was the best-known border crossing between East and West Berlin.
